scope: Runtime truth presentation, interaction, accessibility, responsive layout, rendering paths, and denied release boundary only.
data_lineage_boundary: Displayed source pins and factual-use labels were checked for presence and consistency; upstream data lineage was not independently re-reviewed by CT-42.

local_runtime_dependency.name: globe.gl
local_runtime_dependency.purpose: Pinned, gitignored runtime dependency verified by CT-44 and staged into the candidate deployment.

keyboard.backward_focus_cycle: heading -> Close -> Previous country -> Next country

gates.evidence: The pinned 177-feature source geometry produces one 201-entity interactive deck: 194 reviewed factual entities plus 7 mapped source gaps. The accessible browser retains all 249 registry entities as 206 factual series plus 43 explicit gaps; review_status remains not_reviewed and production_runtime_release remains false.

No target, commitment, delivery, performance, impact-band, or climate-score conclusion is implied; cards and the evidence browser state not reviewed/not assessed, while magnitude is explicitly not a performance score.
China remains magnitude rank 1 at 15,000 MtCO2e/yr; competition ties are preserved; mapped and browser-only source gaps are neutral, unnumbered, visible, and excluded from ranking.
The factual card exposes ten labelled 2014-2023 points, a ten-row Year/Value/Unit table, the pinned PRIMAP-hist v2.6.1 source link, accounting-frame label, and factual-use limitations.

The accessible tree exposes labelled ranking controls, a wrapper-owned modal dialog, named chart and points, table caption and headers, source, limitations, assessment boundary, and a complete 249-record evidence view.

On the exact reviewed runtime, opener activation focuses the card heading; Tab reaches Close; reverse Tab reaches Previous then wraps to Next without background escape; forward wrap returns to the heading; ArrowRight retains replacement-heading focus; Escape and Close restore the original opener.
At 320px and 375px, the evidence-browser and theme controls and card Close control measured 44px in both dimensions; ranking rows and card navigation remain operable by keyboard and pointer.

Exact 320x720 and 375x720 browser viewports had zero document horizontal overflow and zero heading/pill/Close overlap. The cards measured 248px and 303px wide respectively, headings retained usable width, and visible controls remained on-screen.
A 640x400 CSS-pixel viewport at device scale factor 2 had zero horizontal overflow; the 540x262 card remained fully on-screen with no heading, pill, or Close overlap.

With prefers-reduced-motion active, CSS animation and transition were disabled and globe auto-rotation remained false on entry, while selected, after close, and after a dynamic preference change; no-preference correctly restored rotation only when no card was selected.
Formal light and dark text contrast checks remained above 6.28:1, the repaired light banner measured 7.51:1, and explicit focus indicators remained visible in normal and forced-color rendering.

Forced-colors and blocked-font runs retained rank/value/unit labels, explicit source-gap/not-ranked text, assessment-boundary copy, visible focus outlines, one canvas, and non-overlapping cards without relying on color alone.

The exact runtime rendered one WebGL canvas with a 201-entity deck from the validated 177-feature source geometry. Dark surface and sky textures matched the pinned 3600x1800 JPEG and 4096x2048 SVG, with correct MIME, dimensions, flipY state, and sky mesh.

Vendor, WebGL, and constructor failures fail closed to the 249-record evidence browser. Corrupt candidate, geometry, JPEG, SVG, timeout, retry, and WebGL-context-loss routes preserved truthful status and zero-or-one-canvas lifecycle behavior.
SmokeTest passed 22 of 22 with zero failed and zero critical failures; StackLint returned zero issues; CSP reported zero violations and the vendored SVG initiated zero subrequests.

publication_boundary.required_next_gate: CT-40 independent allow decision plus reviewed runtime manifest and release diff
